web.title: Faena Residences Miami - Faena - Official Developer Site
web.description: Discover luxury in Miami at Faena Residences, where oceanfront living meets world-class amenities, stunning views, and renowned, exquisite design.
web.markdown:
[Inquire](https://www.faenaresidencesmiami.com/#)

![faena residences miami](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66bce5850f22ea7c17876a92_faena_residences_miami.svg)

# Faena Residences Miami

[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213a5_circle_arrow.svg)\\
Explore](https://www.faenaresidencesmiami.com/#story)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213a6_hat_icon.svg)

## The World  Is Ready For A  New Story

AT THE HEART OF EVERY THRIVING SOCIETY

LIES A BLOOMING COMMUNITY

> “As we transformed Miami Beach into a global hub of art, culture, hospitality and design, we now embark on a new journey—one that promises to create a groundbreaking cultural epicenter along the Miami River. With our unwavering commitment to beauty, creativity, and innovation, this project will inspire, combining the best of art, architecture, and urban living to build a vibrant community that reflects the dynamic spirit of the New Miami.”
>
> — alan faena

![woman posing in red outfit](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213b3_woman.jpg)

## the Architecture

A New Pinnacle

Exquisite Residences that Redefine the Art of Living

Designed by the legendary Rafael Viñoly Architects, Faena Residences Miami stands as one of the final masterpieces from this visionary architect. Viñoly’s illustrious career has left an indelible mark on the world’s skylines, transforming urban environments with innovative, timeless designs. His work at Faena embodies his bold philosophy, blending functionality with artistry to redefine modern urban living.

![architectural drawing of residences](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c0_architect_drawing.jpg)![architectural drawing of residences with trees](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c3_residences_drawing.png)

> “Elegantly framing views of the city, coastline, and sky, the building will become an iconic part of Miami's skyline.”
>
> ‍— rafael viñoly

Viñoly’s legacy lives on through renowned projects like the **Tokyo International Forum (Tokyo), 432 Park Avenue (NY), 20 Fenchurch Street (London),  Carrasco International Airport (Montevideo), and Cleveland Museum of Art (Ohio)**. His work transcends conventional architecture, seamlessly blending elegance and functionality while leaving a profound impact on modern cities.

![architect rafael vinoly](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c1_architect.jpg)

![architectural drawing](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c2_residences_drawing_two.png)

![Faena Residences Tower](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/671692b887821b84f2635537_residences_miami_tower.jpg)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66df3433b7addb4e3b9fe934_left_arrow.svg)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66df343dd594a2ce5c8196ff_right_arrow.svg)

![woman in boat with red shoes and legs in the air](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c4_woman_boat.jpg)

The Neighborhood

## Life by the Miami River

![The river emblem](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c5_river_emblem.svg)

Discover the elegance of riverfront living. Situated along the Miami River, **Faena Residences Miami** offers a seamless blend of urban sophistication and natural beauty. Just steps away from world-class restaurants, art galleries, and entertainment, this exclusive enclave provides residents with a lifestyle of effortless luxury. Enjoy serene waterfront living with private boat rides and curated shopping experiences, offering seamless access to the cosmopolitan allure of Brickell City Centre. In a city embracing evolution, **Faena Residences Miami** provides an iconic destination where tranquility and vibrancy meet.

![faena residences miami red](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66bcf1f72e362cdeee1bdcbe_faena_red.svg)

Community at the Core

As its first standalone residential project on Miami’s riverfront, this masterpiece of innovation showcases **Faena’s** dedication to artistic vision, cultural richness, and luxury, creating a vertical oasis in the Miami skyline.

‍

A distinctive fusion of five-star hotel luxury and bespoke residential living, these fully serviced condominiums offer an unprecedented level of comfort and sophistication.

A Landmark Collaboration

![culture key icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c8_culture_icon.svg)

### Culture

Rooted in Faena’s dedication to artistic excellence, residents are immersed in a curated selection of art, music, and design, making cultural experiences a part of daily life. Site specific artworks throughout the project elevate every space, ensuring that beauty and creativity are ever-present.

![creativity icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213cb_creativity_icon.svg)

### Creativity

From meticulously crafted interiors to immersive cultural experiences, Faena Residences nurtures an environment that fosters creativity and exploration. Every detail is designed to inspire, encouraging residents to live an enriched and dynamic lifestyle.

![wellness icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213c7_wellness_icon.svg)

### Wellness

Spaces thoughtfully designed to nurture mind, body, and soul. Faena Residences’ wellness offerings feature cutting-edge fitness facilities, holistic wellness treatments, and curated programs designed to enhance balance and rejuvenation, creating a lifestyle of complete well-being for residents.

## The collaboratory

![Rafael Viñoly Architects](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213da_Rafael.jpg)

### Rafael Viñoly  Architects

architecture

Celebrated for transformative designs that shape urban environments, Rafael Viñoly’s innovative approach blends form with function to create iconic structures. His work redefines the future of cities, with landmark projects such as Tokyo International Forum and The Walkie-Talkie in London reflecting his visionary impact on modern architecture.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/671fbdc47b46510286435c06_bos-optimized.jpg)

### Bryan O’Sullivan  Studio

Interior Design

This globally recognized studio, with headquarters in London and New York, brings an eclectic and elegant European perspective to interior design. Their projects, spanning luxury residences, hospitality, and maritime, showcase refined and livable interiors that balance modernity with warmth.

![Sasaki Studio](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213dc_Sasaki.jpg)

### Sasaki  Studio

Landscape Architecture

Sasaki is a global leader in landscape and urban planning, blending architectural design with natural environments. With offices in Boston, Denver, New York, and Shanghai, their interdisciplinary approach enhances communities worldwide through innovative, sustainable design.

## The developers

![fortune international group profile](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/67046bdf07e0aab3f144d3b9_fortune_profile.jpg)

### Fortune International Group

CO-DEVELOPER

Fortune International Group is the only privately owned real estate brand to artfully combine real estate development, sales and marketing representation, and brokerage services in South Florida. Esteemed within the real estate development industry for an unwavering commitment to impeccable quality and craftsmanship, Fortune International Group raises design and engineering standards with each new building they deliver. Guided by insightful leadership, an exceptional in-house team, and more than forty years of experience shaping South Florida’s luxury real estate landscape, Fortune has become highly regarded for its boundary-pushing, expert approach.

![KAR properties co-developer](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213cd_KAR_co_developer.jpg)

### KAR Properties

CO-DEVELOPER

Led by founder and CEO, Mr. Shahab S. Karmely, New York-based KAR Properties is a real estate investment and development firm with more than 35 years of international real estate experience spanning the U.S., Southeast Asia, and Europe. KAR Properties has successfully acquired, repositioned, and monetized more than 3 million square feet of office, luxury mixed use and industrial space.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b51b22120c288af3521378/66b51b22120c288af35213dd_close-x.svg)

INQUIRE

Sales Gallery coming soon

90 SW 3rd Street, Unit Retail 1. Miami, FL 33130

Ph: [305.424.2055](tel:3054242055)

web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://www.faena.com/residences/miami-beach#main-content)

![](https://www.faena.com/sites/default/files/styles/hero/public/media/image/fhmb_pentohouse_13.jpg?h=eac1b2e3&itok=QsYknxYz)

# Faena Miami Beach Penthouse Residences

Experience the peak of residential living. Faena Hotel Miami Beach’s Penthouse Residences spare no luxury and heighten every sense with spectacular views of the ocean, bay, and city skyline. Interiors are highly detailed, featuring custom comfort, fixtures, and appliances.

![dining area in hotel penthouse with a wall of windows](https://www.faena.com/sites/default/files/styles/big_callout_d/public/2025-11/Penthouse%20Top%20Floor%204608x3072.jpg?h=73f8af3d&itok=Cw9O7BLo)

## Faena Multi Bedrooms

Our refined multi-bedroom residences range from 862 to 3,310 square feet and offer uncompromising luxury. Most spaces feature primary quarters, terraces, and secondary bathrooms with en suite baths.

![hotel bedroom with sitting area containing couch and two chairs](https://www.faena.com/sites/default/files/styles/split_callout_d/public/2025-11/Faena%20Penthouse%20Master%20Bedroom%20Styled%204608x3147.jpg?h=c6112e2c&itok=QStIcy8W)

## The Duplex Penthouse

Take in ocean views from every angle in the Duplex Penthouse. Spanning 14,000 square feet of total living space, this residence includes five bedrooms, a chef’s kitchen, extensive entertainment spaces, and a dedicated interior elevator and staircase.

"A hotel to reach far beyond all other possible experiences, the epitome of modern glamour and sensuality."

Baz Luhrmann

[![Pao Unicorn sculpture in the dining area](https://www.faena.com/sites/default/files/styles/three_column_image_callout_m/public/media/image/DSC02988-Enhanced-NR.jpg?h=3652d53e&itok=0efgkOkZ)\\
\\
**Epicurean** \\
\\
Sip & Savor](https://www.faena.com/miami-beach/dining)

[![Colorful mural on a wall at the Art Center](https://www.faena.com/sites/default/files/styles/three_column_image_callout_m/public/media/image/art%20center%20ackermann_01-1500x1000.jpg?h=06ac0d8c&itok=qsCdIf49)\\
\\
**Arts & Culture** \\
\\
Explore Now](https://www.faena.com/miami-beach/things-to-do/art)
